campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they addressed staffing vacancies and discussed recruitment and retention efforts for city positions. The council also heard from the public on various matters and noted that the Boogie Festival is happening this weekend.
keyTopics: Staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention strategies
Public hearing on government code section 3502 compliance
Boogie Festival this weekend
Public comments on council matters

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — June 3, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council met to make decisions about sheriff services for the city. They needed to choose from different service level options that the Sheriff's office proposed and then decide on the city's approach to sheriff services going forward.
keyTopics: Selecting a sheriff service level option for fiscal year 2026
Deciding the city's near-term strategy for sheriff services
Reviewing proposals from the Sheriff's office

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — June 16, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on June 16, 2026, to approve meeting minutes from recent sessions and authorize the Town Manager to execute several contract amendments and new agreements. The main focus was on renewing or extending contracts for legal services, software services, and other vendor agreements to keep town operations running smoothly.
keyTopics: Approved minutes from June 2 and June 8 council meetings
Authorized new five-year software services agreement
Approved amendments to legal services contracts
Authorized litigation legal services agreement

san-jose.title: San José City Council — June 17, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a brief meeting to review and organize the agenda for their June 23 meeting, including adding any new items and setting time limits for discussions. The council also approved spending city funds and accepting donations for San José's participation in the Annual Rose, White & Blue Parade and Festival.
keyTopics: Finalized the June 23, 2026 council meeting agenda
Approved city funding and donations for Rose, White & Blue Parade and Festival participation
Reviewed public records from early June 2026

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — June 23, 2026
mountain-view.summary: Mountain View's City Council met to handle routine city business including budget planning for the coming fiscal year, water management strategy updates, and several construction projects. The council also recognized community organizations and celebrated City Attorney Jennifer Logue's appointment to the judiciary, while addressing two pending lawsuits the city faces.
keyTopics: Fiscal Year 2026-27 budget and spending limits approved
Water management plan updated to address potential shortages
Public Safety Building construction moving forward
Shoreline Golf Links parking lot repaving project
Two pending lawsuits against the city being managed

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — June 23, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special closed-door meeting on June 23, 2026, followed by a regular council meeting at 7 P.M. The closed session discussed matters that are not open to the public, which typically include personnel, legal, or real estate issues.
keyTopics: Closed session meeting
Regular council meeting convened at 7 P.M.

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 16, 2026
cupertino.summary: The City Council held a study session to review how Cupertino's parks and recreational facilities are currently zoned and protected under state law. The meeting included a public comment period where residents could speak about any city matters not on the formal agenda.
keyTopics: Review of zoning designations for parks and recreational areas
State law protections for parkland sites
Potential zoning corrections to existing park designations
Public comment period on non-agenda items (limited to 30 minutes)

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 30, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council held a meeting on June 30, 2026, available both in person and online. Residents can participate remotely through Zoom or by phone, and can submit written comments before the meeting through the city's online agenda system.
keyTopics: Hybrid meeting format - attend in person or join via Zoom
Remote participation options by phone (1-669-900-6833)
Written public comments accepted through eComment system on city website

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — June 16, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met to approve funding and development plans for the city's next fiscal year. The main items included adopting a community development budget, approving a new residential or commercial development project, and launching a program to reduce storefront crime.
keyTopics: 2026-2027 community development funding and annual action plan
New site development permit and housing/commercial project approval
Storefront crime prevention program launch
City council meeting calendar and procedural approvals

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — June 23, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to approve turning part of the Measure E development site into public parkland and to review plans for expanding the driving range at Baylands Golf Links. The council also received updates from liaisons and various city departments.
keyTopics: New park dedication on Measure E site
Baylands Golf Links driving range expansion feasibility
City department and liaison updates
